models.name: Claude 4 Sonnet
models.notes: Hidden by default; Thinking variant counts as 2 requests in legacy pricing

models.name: Claude 4 Sonnet 1M
models.notes: Hidden by default; Thinking variant counts as 2 requests in legacy pricing; This model can be very expensive due to the large context window; The cost is 2x when the input exceeds 200k tokens

models.name: Claude 4.5 Haiku
models.notes: Hidden by default; Bedrock/Vertex: regional endpoints +10% surcharge; Cache: writes 1.25x, reads 0.1x

models.name: Claude 4.5 Opus
models.notes: Hidden by default; Requires Max Mode on request-based plans

models.name: Claude 4.5 Sonnet
models.notes: Hidden by default; Requires Max Mode on request-based plans; Up to 1M tokens in Max Mode at the same per-token rates (no long-context surcharge)

models.name: Claude 4.6 Opus
models.notes: Hidden by default; Requires Max Mode on request-based plans; Up to 1M tokens in Max Mode at the same per-token rates (no long-context surcharge)

models.name: Claude 4.6 Opus (Fast mode)
models.notes: Hidden by default; Requires Max Mode on request-based plans; Limited research preview; Up to 1M tokens in Max Mode at the same per-token rates as shorter context

models.name: Claude 4.6 Sonnet
models.notes: Requires Max Mode on request-based plans; Up to 1M tokens in Max Mode at the same per-token rates (no long-context surcharge)

models.name: Claude 4.7 Opus
models.notes: Hidden by default; Requires Max Mode on request-based plans; Up to 1M tokens in Max Mode at the same per-token rates (no long-context surcharge)

models.name: Claude Fable 5
models.notes: Requires data retention approval for Enterprise customers, Teams and individual customers with Privacy Mode enabled; Anthropic stores agent input and output data for harm-prevention processes; this data is not used to train or improve Anthropic models or products; Requests that trip a security guardrail are automatically routed to Claude Opus; About 2x the cost of Claude Opus 4.8; Requires Max Mode on request-based plans

models.name: Claude Opus 4.7 (fast mode)
models.notes: Hidden by default; Requires Max Mode on request-based plans; Limited research preview; Up to 1M tokens in Max Mode at the same per-token rates as shorter context

models.name: Claude Opus 4.8
models.notes: Requires Max Mode on request-based plans; Fast mode (\`claude-opus-4-8-fast\`) requires Max Mode; Fast mode is 3x lower per-token pricing than Opus 4.7 fast mode; Up to 1M tokens in Max Mode at the same per-token rates (no long-context surcharge)

models.name: Gemini 3 Pro Image Preview
models.notes: Hidden by default; Native image generation model optimized for speed, flexibility, and contextual understanding; Text input and output priced the same as Gemini 3 Pro; Image output: $120/1M tokens (\~$0.134 per 1K/2K image, \~$0.24 per 4K image); Preview models may change before becoming stable and have more restrictive rate limits

models.name: GPT-5.3 Codex

models.name: GPT-5.4
models.notes: Hidden by default; Requires Max Mode on request-based plans; Agentic and reasoning capabilities; 90% discount on cached input tokens; Fast mode is 15% faster with 2x pricing; Long context (Max Mode) supports up to 1M tokens with 2x input pricing

models.name: GPT-5.4 Mini
models.notes: Hidden by default; Smaller, faster variant of GPT-5.4; 90% discount on cached input tokens

models.name: GPT-5.4 Nano
models.notes: Hidden by default; Smallest GPT-5.4 variant, optimized for cost; 90% discount on cached input tokens

models.name: GPT-5.5
models.notes: Requires Max Mode on request-based plans; Agentic and reasoning capabilities; More token-efficient than GPT-5.4 on comparable tasks; Improved persistence on long-running tasks; Fast mode is available at higher rates; Long context (Max Mode) supports up to 1M tokens with 2x input pricing
